RESTful API Design & Consumption

Backend Development with Node.js / Spring Boot / Django

Introduction to Docker & Containerization
CI/CD Basics with GitHub Actions / Jenkins
advanced_syllabus: Microservices Architecture & Service Discovery
Advanced Spring Boot / Django REST / FastAPI
Distributed Systems Design & Scalability Patterns
Kubernetes Orchestration & Helm Charts
DevOps Integration: Full CI/CD Pipelines & IaC with Terraform

Performance Optimization: Caching, Load Balancing, Profiling
Advanced Database: Indexing, Partitioning, Distributed DBs

Capstone: End-to-End Application Build & Cloud Deployment

basic_syllabus: Introduction to Data Science, AI & the Data Lifecycle

Support Vector Machines, KNN & Ensemble Methods
Feature Engineering, Selection & Hyperparameter Tuning
Time Series Analysis & Forecasting (ARIMA, Prophet)
Introduction to Deep Learning: Neural Networks & Backpropagation
NLP Basics: Tokenization, TF-IDF, Sentiment Analysis
Big Data Tools: Apache Spark & PySpark
Model Deployment with Flask / FastAPI & Docker
Cloud ML Platforms: AWS SageMaker / Azure ML / GCP AI
Data Pipelines & Workflow Automation

Transformers, BERT, GPT & Generative AI Models

Generative Adversarial Networks (GANs) & VAEs

AI Ethics, Bias Mitigation, Explainability (SHAP, LIME)
AI in Domain Applications: Healthcare, Finance, Robotics
Capstone: End-to-End AI Solution Design & Deployment

Python for Data Science: NumPy, Pandas, Matplotlib
Mathematics & Statistics: Linear Algebra, Probability, Descriptive Stats
Data Collection, Cleaning & Preprocessing
Exploratory Data Analysis (EDA) & Data Visualization
Introduction to Machine Learning: Supervised vs Unsupervised
Linear Regression & Logistic Regression
Model Evaluation Metrics: Accuracy, Precision, Recall, F1
SQL for Data Analysis & Jupyter Notebook Workflow
Introduction to Big Data Concepts & Hadoop Overview
intermediate_syllabus: Advanced ML Algorithms: Decision Trees, Random Forests, XGBoost
Support Vector Machines, KNN & Ensemble Methods
Feature Engineering, Selection & Hyperparameter Tuning
Time Series Analysis & Forecasting (ARIMA, Prophet)
Introduction to Deep Learning: Neural Networks & Backpropagation
NLP Basics: Tokenization, TF-IDF, Sentiment Analysis
Big Data Tools: Apache Spark & PySpark
Model Deployment with Flask / FastAPI & Docker
Cloud ML Platforms: AWS SageMaker / Azure ML / GCP AI
Data Pipelines & Workflow Automation
advanced_syllabus: Deep Learning: CNNs, RNNs, LSTMs for Computer Vision & Sequence Data
Transformers, BERT, GPT & Generative AI Models
Reinforcement Learning: Q-Learning, Deep Q-Networks, Policy Gradients
Generative Adversarial Networks (GANs) & VAEs
Advanced NLP: Named Entity Recognition, Machine Translation
MLOps: Model Monitoring, CI/CD for ML, MLflow & Kubeflow
Scalable ML: Dask, Spark MLlib, Distributed Training
AI Ethics, Bias Mitigation, Explainability (SHAP, LIME)
AI in Domain Applications: Healthcare, Finance, Robotics
Capstone: End-to-End AI Solution Design & Deployment

existing_syllabus_details: Module 1: Cloud AWS 1 Course Fundamentals (8 topics) | Module 2: Core Concepts & Theory (10 topics) | Module 3: Practical Applications (12 topics) | Module 4: Advanced Topics & Projects (8 topics) | Module 5: Interview Prep & Certification (6 topics)
basic_syllabus: Introduction to Cloud Computing: IaaS, PaaS, SaaS Models
AWS / Azure / GCP Global Infrastructure Overview
IAM: Users, Groups, Roles & Policies
Amazon S3 / Azure Blob: Buckets & Lifecycle Policies
Virtual Private Cloud (VPC) Basics & Subnet Design
Networking Fundamentals: IP, DNS, HTTP, Subnets, Firewalls
Introduction to EC2 / Azure VM: Launching & Managing Instances
Cloud Pricing Models & Cost Management Tools
Cloud Security Fundamentals & Shared Responsibility Model
Hands-on: Setting Up Cloud Account & Deploying First App
intermediate_syllabus: Elastic Load Balancing & Auto Scaling Groups
AWS RDS / Azure SQL / Cloud Databases & DynamoDB
Advanced VPC: NAT Gateways, VPN, Direct Connect
DNS Management with Route 53 / Azure DNS
Container Services: AWS ECS / EKS, Azure AKS
Serverless Computing: AWS Lambda, Azure Functions
CloudWatch / Azure Monitor: Logging, Metrics & Alerts
Cloud Security: KMS, WAF, Shield, MFA, Identity Federation
Infrastructure as Code with CloudFormation / ARM Templates
Designing Fault-Tolerant & Highly Available Architectures
advanced_syllabus: Advanced Serverless & Event-Driven Architectures (Step Functions)
Multi-Cloud & Hybrid Cloud Architecture Design
Advanced Kubernetes: Helm, Service Mesh, RBAC, Scaling
DevOps on Cloud: CI/CD with CodePipeline / Azure DevOps
Big Data on Cloud: EMR, Redshift, Athena, AWS Glue
Machine Learning on Cloud: SageMaker, Azure ML, Vertex AI
Advanced Cloud Security: Zero Trust, DevSecOps, Compliance
Cost Optimization Strategies & Cloud FinOps
Disaster Recovery, RTO/RPO Planning & Business Continuity
Capstone: Scalable Cloud-Native Application Deployment

basic_syllabus: Introduction to Project Management & PMBOK Framework
Project Lifecycle: Initiation, Planning, Execution, Monitoring, Closing
Work Breakdown Structure (WBS) & Scope Definition
Basic Scheduling: Gantt Charts, Milestones & Timelines
Resource Identification & Basic Allocation
Risk Management Fundamentals: Identification & Categorization
Stakeholder Communication & Documentation Basics
Introduction to Agile Principles & Scrum Overview
Compliance & Ethics in Project Management
Introduction to PM Tools: Jira, Trello, MS Project
intermediate_syllabus: Advanced Scope & Schedule Management: CPM & PERT Analysis
Budgeting, Cost Estimation & Earned Value Management (EVM)
Quantitative & Qualitative Risk Analysis & Contingency Planning
Stakeholder Engagement & Conflict Resolution Strategies
Quality Management: Six Sigma, Pareto Analysis, QA vs QC
Procurement: Vendor Selection, Contract Types & Management
Agile Frameworks: Scrum, Kanban & Hybrid Approaches
Team Leadership: Motivation, Delegation & Team Dynamics
Change Management: Processes & Controlling Scope Creep
KPIs, Performance Dashboards & Executive Reporting
advanced_syllabus: Strategic Project Management: Aligning Projects to Business Goals
Portfolio & Program Management
Advanced Risk Management: Monte Carlo Simulation, Risk Registers
Scaling Agile: SAFe, LeSS & Disciplined Agile (DA)
Advanced Leadership: Emotional Intelligence, Leading Through Change
Advanced EVM: Forecasting, TCPI & Variance Analysis
Governance, Compliance & Sustainability in Projects
Advanced Procurement & Contract Negotiation
PMP Exam Preparation: Domains (People, Process, Business Environment)
Maintaining Certification: PDUs, Continuing Education & PMI Standards

existing_syllabus_details: Module 1: SAP Course 1 Course Fundamentals (8 topics) | Module 2: Core Concepts & Theory (10 topics) | Module 3: Practical Applications (12 topics) | Module 4: Advanced Topics & Projects (8 topics) | Module 5: Interview Prep & Certification (6 topics)
basic_syllabus: Introduction to SAP ERP, S/4HANA & ECC Architecture
SAP Navigation: GUI, Fiori, Transaction Codes
SAP Modules Overview: FICO, SD, MM, HCM, PP
Master Data Management: Customer, Vendor, Material Data
SAP FICO Basics: General Ledger, AP/AR, Bank Reconciliation
SAP SD Basics: Order-to-Cash (O2C) Process
SAP MM Basics: Procurement & Inventory Management
SAP HCM Basics: Payroll, Time Management, Org Management
SAP Security & Authorization: User Roles & Profiles
Introduction to SAP CRM: Architecture & Core Functionalities
intermediate_syllabus: SAP FICO Advanced: Cost Center Accounting, Asset Accounting
SAP SD Advanced: Pricing, Shipping, Billing Configuration
SAP MM Advanced: Purchase Orders, GR/IR, Inventory Valuation
SAP HCM Advanced: ESS/MSS, Succession Planning
SAP ABAP Programming: Syntax, Reports, BAPIs, Debugging
SAP Basis Administration: Transport System, HANA DB Basics
SAP Business Objects: Reporting, Dashboards, Analytics Cloud
SAP CRM: Campaign Mgmt, Lead Mgmt, Interaction Center Config
Cross-Module Integration: P2P, O2C, R2R End-to-End Processes
SAP Integration Technologies: IDocs, BAPIs, Web Services
advanced_syllabus: SAP S/4HANA Migration & Clean Core Principles
Advanced SAP FICO: COPA, Consolidation, Treasury Management
Advanced SAP ABAP: OOP in ABAP, Fiori Extensions, Gateway
SAP BW/4HANA & Data Warehousing
SAP Analytics Cloud (SAC): Predictive Analytics & ML Integration
Advanced SAP Basis: HANA Optimization, Disaster Recovery
SAP Security: Advanced Roles, GRC, Compliance Automation
SAP Activate Methodology & Project Implementation
SAP Integration Suite: API Management, BTP Integration
SAP Certification Preparation & Exam Strategies

existing_syllabus_details: Module 1: DevOps Automation 1 Course Fundamentals (8 topics) | Module 2: Core Concepts & Theory (10 topics) | Module 3: Practical Applications (12 topics) | Module 4: Advanced Topics & Projects (8 topics) | Module 5: Interview Prep & Certification (6 topics)
basic_syllabus: Introduction to DevOps: Principles, Culture & Lifecycle
Linux Fundamentals: Commands, File System, Permissions, Shell Scripting
Version Control with Git & GitHub: Clone, Commit, Push, Branch
Introduction to CI/CD Concepts & GitHub Actions Basics
Docker Basics: Images, Containers, Volumes & Dockerfile
Introduction to Cloud Computing: AWS EC2, S3 Overview
Basic Automation with Bash Scripting & Cron Jobs
Monitoring Basics: Introduction to Prometheus & Grafana
Agile & Scrum Fundamentals for DevOps Teams
Overview of RPA Tools: UiPath / Automation Anywhere / Blue Prism
intermediate_syllabus: Containerization with Docker Compose & Multi-Container Apps
Kubernetes Basics: Pods, Deployments, Services, YAML Manifests
CI/CD Pipelines with Jenkins / GitHub Actions / GitLab CI
Configuration Management with Ansible & Chef
Infrastructure as Code (IaC) with Terraform
AWS DevOps Services: CodePipeline, CodeBuild, CodeDeploy
Advanced Linux Administration & Networking Configuration
Monitoring & Observability: Prometheus, Grafana, ELK Stack
RPA Intermediate: Building Bots, Exception Handling, Orchestrator
Artifact Management & Automated Testing in Pipelines
advanced_syllabus: Advanced Kubernetes: Helm, Ingress, Service Mesh (Istio), RBAC
GitOps Workflows with ArgoCD & Flux
Advanced IaC: Modular Terraform, Multi-Cloud, State Locking
Platform Engineering: Internal Developer Platforms (Backstage)
DevSecOps: Trivy, SonarQube, Security in CI/CD Pipelines
Advanced Cloud Architecture: Serverless, Hybrid & Multi-Cloud
Chaos Engineering: Failure Injection & Resilience Testing
AI-Augmented DevOps: Predictive Scaling & Anomaly Detection
Advanced RPA: Cognitive Automation, AI Integration, CoE Setup
Capstone: Full DevOps Pipeline Deployment on Cloud

basic_syllabus: Introduction to Data Science, AI & the Data Lifecycle
Python for Data Science: NumPy, Pandas, Matplotlib
Mathematics & Statistics: Linear Algebra, Probability, Descriptive Stats
Data Collection, Cleaning & Preprocessing
Exploratory Data Analysis (EDA) & Data Visualization
Introduction to Machine Learning: Supervised vs Unsupervised
Linear Regression & Logistic Regression
Model Evaluation Metrics: Accuracy, Precision, Recall, F1
SQL for Data Analysis & Jupyter Notebook Workflow

intermediate_syllabus: Advanced ML Algorithms: Decision Trees, Random Forests, XGBoost
Support Vector Machines, KNN & Ensemble Methods
Feature Engineering, Selection & Hyperparameter Tuning
Time Series Analysis & Forecasting (ARIMA, Prophet)
Introduction to Deep Learning: Neural Networks & Backpropagation
NLP Basics: Tokenization, TF-IDF, Sentiment Analysis
Big Data Tools: Apache Spark & PySpark
Model Deployment with Flask / FastAPI & Docker
Cloud ML Platforms: AWS SageMaker / Azure ML / GCP AI
Data Pipelines & Workflow Automation
advanced_syllabus: Deep Learning: CNNs, RNNs, LSTMs for Computer Vision & Sequence Data
Transformers, BERT, GPT & Generative AI Models
Reinforcement Learning: Q-Learning, Deep Q-Networks, Policy Gradients
Generative Adversarial Networks (GANs) & VAEs
Advanced NLP: Named Entity Recognition, Machine Translation
MLOps: Model Monitoring, CI/CD for ML, MLflow & Kubeflow
Scalable ML: Dask, Spark MLlib, Distributed Training
AI Ethics, Bias Mitigation, Explainability (SHAP, LIME)
AI in Domain Applications: Healthcare, Finance, Robotics
Capstone: End-to-End AI Solution Design & Deployment

basic_syllabus: Introduction to DevOps: Principles, Culture & Lifecycle
Linux Fundamentals: Commands, File System, Permissions, Shell Scripting
Version Control with Git & GitHub: Clone, Commit, Push, Branch
Introduction to CI/CD Concepts & GitHub Actions Basics
Docker Basics: Images, Containers, Volumes & Dockerfile
Introduction to Cloud Computing: AWS EC2, S3 Overview
Basic Automation with Bash Scripting & Cron Jobs
Monitoring Basics: Introduction to Prometheus & Grafana
Agile & Scrum Fundamentals for DevOps Teams
Overview of RPA Tools: UiPath / Automation Anywhere / Blue Prism
intermediate_syllabus: Containerization with Docker Compose & Multi-Container Apps
Kubernetes Basics: Pods, Deployments, Services, YAML Manifests
CI/CD Pipelines with Jenkins / GitHub Actions / GitLab CI
Configuration Management with Ansible & Chef
Infrastructure as Code (IaC) with Terraform
AWS DevOps Services: CodePipeline, CodeBuild, CodeDeploy
Advanced Linux Administration & Networking Configuration
Monitoring & Observability: Prometheus, Grafana, ELK Stack
RPA Intermediate: Building Bots, Exception Handling, Orchestrator
Artifact Management & Automated Testing in Pipelines
advanced_syllabus: Advanced Kubernetes: Helm, Ingress, Service Mesh (Istio), RBAC
GitOps Workflows with ArgoCD & Flux
Advanced IaC: Modular Terraform, Multi-Cloud, State Locking
Platform Engineering: Internal Developer Platforms (Backstage)
DevSecOps: Trivy, SonarQube, Security in CI/CD Pipelines
Advanced Cloud Architecture: Serverless, Hybrid & Multi-Cloud
Chaos Engineering: Failure Injection & Resilience Testing
AI-Augmented DevOps: Predictive Scaling & Anomaly Detection
Advanced RPA: Cognitive Automation, AI Integration, CoE Setup
Capstone: Full DevOps Pipeline Deployment on Cloud

Advanced RPA: Cognitive Automation, AI Integration, CoE Setup
Capstone: Full DevOps Pipeline Deployment on Cloud

basic_syllabus: Introduction to HR Management: Functions, Roles & Responsibilities

Team Dynamics & Group Behavior Fundamentals
Business Etiquette & Professional Development

Advanced Recruitment: Employer Branding & Talent Pipeline
Employee Engagement, Motivation & Retention Strategies
Compensation & Benefits: Pay Structures & Incentive Programs

basic_syllabus: Introduction to Design Principles: Color Theory, Typography, Layout
Design Thinking & Creative Problem-Solving Process
Adobe Photoshop / Illustrator Basics: Tools & Interface
Sketching & Conceptualization Techniques
Introduction to UX/UI Design: Wireframing & Prototyping
Fashion Design Fundamentals: Fabric, Silhouettes, Garment Construction
Interior Design Basics: Space Planning, Furniture Selection, Color Schemes
3D Modeling Basics: Introduction to 3Ds Max / Blender
Digital Photography & Visual Communication Basics
Portfolio Building: Organizing & Presenting Design Work
intermediate_syllabus: Advanced Adobe Suite: Photoshop, Illustrator, InDesign Workflows
UI Design with Figma / Adobe XD: Components, Auto Layout
User Research Methods: Interviews, Surveys, Usability Testing
Intermediate 3D Modeling & Rendering (3Ds Max, V-Ray)
Fashion Illustration & Garment Detailing Techniques

Brand Identity Design: Logo, Style Guides, Brand Consistency
Responsive Design & Accessibility for Digital Products
Motion Graphics Basics: Adobe After Effects Introduction
Design Project Management & Client Collaboration
advanced_syllabus: Advanced UX Research: Eye Tracking, A/B Testing, Heuristic Evaluation
Design Systems Creation & Token-Based Design Handoffs
Advanced 3D Visualization: Photorealistic Rendering & Animation
Advanced Fashion Design: Pattern Making, Draping, Collection Development
Interior Design: BIM with Revit, Space Planning for Commercial Interiors
Interaction Design: Micro-animations, Gesture-based UI, Voice UI
Advanced Motion Graphics & Video Production
Sustainable & Ethical Design Practices
Freelance & Business of Design: Pricing, Contracts, Client Management
Capstone: Complete Design Project from Brief to Final Presentation

existing_syllabus_details: Module 1: Job-Oriented Programs 1 Course Fundamentals (8 topics) | Module 2: Core Concepts & Theory (10 topics) | Module 3: Practical Applications (12 topics) | Module 4: Advanced Topics & Projects (8 topics) | Module 5: Interview Prep & Certification (6 topics)
basic_syllabus: Introduction to Programming & SDLC Overview
Variables, Data Types, Operators & Control Flow
Functions, Modular Programming & Code Reuse
Object-Oriented Programming: Classes, Objects, Inheritance, Polymorphism
Basic Data Structures: Arrays, Lists, Stacks, Queues
Introduction to Version Control with Git & GitHub
HTML, CSS & JavaScript Fundamentals
Database Basics & SQL CRUD Operations
Debugging Techniques & Writing Simple Unit Tests
IDE Setup, Command Line Basics & Package Managers
intermediate_syllabus: Advanced OOP: Design Patterns (Singleton, Factory, Observer)
Intermediate Data Structures & Algorithms (Linked Lists, Trees, Graphs)
RESTful API Design & Consumption
Frontend Frameworks: React / Angular / Vue.js Basics
Backend Development with Node.js / Spring Boot / Django
Database Management: Advanced SQL, ORM, NoSQL Intro
Unit & Integration Testing with Jest / JUnit / PyTest
Advanced Git Workflows: Branching, Merging, Pull Requests
Introduction to Docker & Containerization
CI/CD Basics with GitHub Actions / Jenkins
advanced_syllabus: Microservices Architecture & Service Discovery
Advanced Spring Boot / Django REST / FastAPI
Distributed Systems Design & Scalability Patterns
Kubernetes Orchestration & Helm Charts
DevOps Integration: Full CI/CD Pipelines & IaC with Terraform
Security: OAuth2, JWT, OWASP Top 10, Secure Coding
Performance Optimization: Caching, Load Balancing, Profiling
Advanced Database: Indexing, Partitioning, Distributed DBs
Machine Learning API Integration (TensorFlow, PyTorch)
Capstone: End-to-End Application Build & Cloud Deployment

Functions, Modular Programming & Code Reuse
Object-Oriented Programming: Classes, Objects, Inheritance, Polymorphism
Basic Data Structures: Arrays, Lists, Stacks, Queues

HTML, CSS & JavaScript Fundamentals

Debugging Techniques & Writing Simple Unit Tests
IDE Setup, Command Line Basics & Package Managers

Intermediate Data Structures & Algorithms (Linked Lists, Trees, Graphs)
RESTful API Design & Consumption
Frontend Frameworks: React / Angular / Vue.js Basics
Backend Development with Node.js / Spring Boot / Django
Database Management: Advanced SQL, ORM, NoSQL Intro
Unit & Integration Testing with Jest / JUnit / PyTest
Advanced Git Workflows: Branching, Merging, Pull Requests
Introduction to Docker & Containerization
CI/CD Basics with GitHub Actions / Jenkins
advanced_syllabus: Microservices Architecture & Service Discovery
Advanced Spring Boot / Django REST / FastAPI
Distributed Systems Design & Scalability Patterns
Kubernetes Orchestration & Helm Charts
DevOps Integration: Full CI/CD Pipelines & IaC with Terraform
Security: OAuth2, JWT, OWASP Top 10, Secure Coding
Performance Optimization: Caching, Load Balancing, Profiling
Advanced Database: Indexing, Partitioning, Distributed DBs
Machine Learning API Integration (TensorFlow, PyTorch)
Capstone: End-to-End Application Build & Cloud Deployment

existing_syllabus_details: Module 1: Cloud Platforms 1 Course Fundamentals (8 topics) | Module 2: Core Concepts & Theory (10 topics) | Module 3: Practical Applications (12 topics) | Module 4: Advanced Topics & Projects (8 topics) | Module 5: Interview Prep & Certification (6 topics)
basic_syllabus: Introduction to Cloud Computing: IaaS, PaaS, SaaS Models
AWS / Azure / GCP Global Infrastructure Overview
IAM: Users, Groups, Roles & Policies
Amazon S3 / Azure Blob: Buckets & Lifecycle Policies
Virtual Private Cloud (VPC) Basics & Subnet Design
Networking Fundamentals: IP, DNS, HTTP, Subnets, Firewalls
Introduction to EC2 / Azure VM: Launching & Managing Instances
Cloud Pricing Models & Cost Management Tools
Cloud Security Fundamentals & Shared Responsibility Model
Hands-on: Setting Up Cloud Account & Deploying First App
intermediate_syllabus: Elastic Load Balancing & Auto Scaling Groups
AWS RDS / Azure SQL / Cloud Databases & DynamoDB
Advanced VPC: NAT Gateways, VPN, Direct Connect
DNS Management with Route 53 / Azure DNS
Container Services: AWS ECS / EKS, Azure AKS
Serverless Computing: AWS Lambda, Azure Functions
CloudWatch / Azure Monitor: Logging, Metrics & Alerts
Cloud Security: KMS, WAF, Shield, MFA, Identity Federation
Infrastructure as Code with CloudFormation / ARM Templates
Designing Fault-Tolerant & Highly Available Architectures
advanced_syllabus: Advanced Serverless & Event-Driven Architectures (Step Functions)
Multi-Cloud & Hybrid Cloud Architecture Design
Advanced Kubernetes: Helm, Service Mesh, RBAC, Scaling
DevOps on Cloud: CI/CD with CodePipeline / Azure DevOps
Big Data on Cloud: EMR, Redshift, Athena, AWS Glue
Machine Learning on Cloud: SageMaker, Azure ML, Vertex AI
Advanced Cloud Security: Zero Trust, DevSecOps, Compliance
Cost Optimization Strategies & Cloud FinOps
Disaster Recovery, RTO/RPO Planning & Business Continuity
Capstone: Scalable Cloud-Native Application Deployment

basic_syllabus: Introduction to Software Testing: STLC, Types of Testing

Advanced Performance Engineering: Scalability, Load & Stress Testing
Chaos Engineering: Failure Injection & Resilience Testing

Digital Forensics: Memory, Network, Disk Forensics

Zero Trust Architecture & DevSecOps Integration
Advanced Cryptography: Quantum Cryptography, Blockchain Security
